validation: Exact Blender/browser topology and local bounds in all fourteen cases covering editable text, size, alignment, character spacing, text-box wrapping, and fill modes. The browser reconstructs flat.nodes.003 from its evaluated col/power attributes with no palette correction. Aligned captures reach 0.946086 silhouette IoU, 1.741 px corner RMSE, 0.014901 RGB MAE, and 0.012349 luminance MAE; residual mask error is antialias coverage around the small glyphs.
